security_considerations: The endpoint exposes no sensitive data
regression_risks: The existing root route must remain unchanged

diff:
--- a/app.py
+++ b/app.py
@@ -6,3 +6,8 @@
 @app.get("/")
 def root() -> dict[str, str]:
     return {"message": "demo"}
+
+
+@app.get("/health")
+def health() -> dict[str, str]:
+    return {"status": "ok"}
--- a/tests/test_app.py
+++ b/tests/test_app.py
@@ -6,3 +6,9 @@
 
 def test_root() -> None:
     assert client.get("/").json() == {"message": "demo"}  # noqa: S101  # nosec B101
+
+
+def test_health() -> None:
+    response = client.get("/health")
+    assert response.status_code == 200  # nosec B101
+    assert response.json() == {"status": "ok"}  # nosec B101
